text:
Once upon a time in the lush countryside, there lived a girl named Lily. She had a heart as big as the field her grandfather farmed near the River Acheron. Every morning, birds sang as she embarked on her ritual of plucking fresh berries forelixir—they were rumored to imbue courage.

On the eve before a mysterious event, Lily dreamed of a phoenix—forged from feathers from her own first love. Whenever something frightening happened, this feathered sentinel would rise from the ashes.

One serene morning, the village elder requested Lily's assistance with an ancient curse. It was said that whoever could prove their valor would earn the privilege of visiting Zeus's domain. The curse couldn't be lifted by anyone lacking courage.

Lily gathered her berries—her special concoction—and embarked on the journey to see Zeus. Along the way, she encountered the Shadow Woods, where every shadow contained a ghost story. They whispered secrets.
